name: Aberrancy

name: Solaris Storm
description: Deals Fire DMG 3 times to all enemies within a 1-grid square area around the caster, then deals Fire DMG once to all enemies within a 2-grid circular area around the caster. (Zero Initial CD)
keywords: Zero Initial CD: This skill can be cast on the caster's first turn and enters cooldown after casting.

name: Soul Breaker
description: Increase the caster's DMG dealt for every 15% HP lost of the target. Stacks up to 5 times.

name: Soul Impact
description: When the caster's summon dies or expires, deals Dark DMG once to all enemies within 2 grids of it.

name: Soul Pact Resonance
description: Grants an ATK boost when the caster has a summon on the battlefield.

name: Soul Piercer
description: Deals Dark DMG once to all enemies within 3×2 grid area in front of the caster, with a 10% Lifesteal effect.
keywords: Lifesteal: Heals the caster for a percentage of DMG dealt to the target. DMG to shields does not trigger this effect.

name: Soul Protection
description: At the start of battle, converts 50% of the caster's current HP into a shield. Restores HP proportional to the remaining shield strength upon victory.
keywords: At the Start of Battle: When a character has multiple pre-battle skills to cast, they are activated in order: Charms before Techniques, from top to bottom based on their slot order. If multiple units have pre-battle skills, they act in order of highest to lowest SPD at the start of the pre-battle phase. The formal battle turn begins after all units from both sides have cast these skills.

name: Soul Reap
description: Deals Dark DMG twice to 1 enemy within 3 grids of the caster. For every 5% HP lost by the target, this skill deals 5% more DMG, up to a max of 50% increase. (Prioritizes large targets)

name: Soul Spark
description: Increases the ATK of the caster's summons but reduces their duration by 2 turns. (Summons last at least 1 turn; this Charm does not affect summons without a turn limit.)

name: Soul Splash
description: The caster's Single-Hit Techniques deal more DMG. Killing an enemy deals additional Fire DMG once to all enemies within 2 grids of the target. The DMG dealt is 60% of the overkill DMG.
keywords: Single-Hit Technique: A Technique that deals a single instance of damage, such as Edge Strike or Fire Slash.
Note: The DMG is fixed and unaffected by Effects or Affinities. In PvP battles, overkill DMG from defeating Summons and Fantomons drops to 20% and 33%, respectively.

name: Soulbond Restoration
description: When the caster's summon dies or expires, heals the caster once.
keywords: Heal: When casting healing Techniques, only heals targets with less than 100% HP. Healing power is based on the caster's max HP.

name: Soulfire Protection
description: At the start of battle, consumes 50% of the caster's current HP to grant the caster a DMG Reduction effect. This effect cannot be dispelled.
keywords: At the Start of Battle: When a character has multiple pre-battle skills to cast, they are activated in order: Charms before Techniques, from top to bottom based on their slot order. If multiple units have pre-battle skills, they act in order of highest to lowest SPD at the start of the pre-battle phase. The formal battle turn begins after all units from both sides have cast these skills.

name: Soulweave
description: When 3 of the caster's summons die or disappear, summons 1 Infernal Fiend in front of the caster that immediately acts. The summon inherits a percentage of the caster's stats. (The Charm can only trigger once per battle.)
keywords: Summon: Summon's level equals the skill level. Summons cannot receive any stat boosts.

name: Source of Vitality
description: Heals the caster once at the start of the caster's turn.
keywords: Heal: When casting healing Techniques, only heals targets with less than 100% HP. Healing power is based on the caster's max HP.

name: Spirit Aegis
description: Grants Spirit Mark to the allied character with the lowest HP within 5 grids of the caster.
keywords: Spirit Mark: When the bearer takes single DMG exceeding 4% of max HP, consumes the Marks to reduce DMG taken.
Character: Main character and companions only. Summons and materialized Fantomons are not included.

name: Spirit in Fire
description: Reduces DMG taken during the caster's turn.

name: Star Shattering Slash
description: Deals Physical DMG once to 1 enemy within 1 grid of the caster. (Prioritizes large targets)

name: Starlight Burst
description: Selects a grid within 5 grids of the caster. Deals Light DMG once to all enemies within 2 grids of the target grid, with a 30% base chance to inflict Blind.
keywords: Blind: Grants a 50% chance to miss the target when using the next damaging Technique.
Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.

name: Stone Skin
description: Reduces the caster's DMG taken for 1 turn for every 1 instance of Technique DMG the caster takes. This effect can stack up to 9 times.

name: Stonechief Summon
description: Summons a Stonechief in front of the caster that immediately acts. The summon inherits a percentage of the caster's stats and remains for up to 5 turns. (Zero Initial CD)
keywords: Summon: Summon's level equals the skill level. Summons cannot receive any stat boosts.
Zero Initial CD: This skill can be cast on the caster's first turn and enters cooldown after casting.

name: Storm Rhapsody
description: Selects a grid within 5 grids of the caster. Deals Wind DMG 3 times to all enemies within 3 grids of the target grid with a 35% base chance to knock them back by 1 grid towards the center of the battlefield.
keywords: Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.

Knockback: Knocks back the enemy target a certain distance. If collision occurs with other units or obstacles, the colliding enemy target take Physical DMG once equal to 10% of their max HP, at a max of 60% of the caster's ATK.

name: Strength Rules
description: Increases the caster's Physical Mastery.

name: Stunning Strike
description: Attacks 1 enemy within 1 grid of the caster, dealing Physical DMG once, with a 40% base chance to inflict Stun for 1 turn.
keywords: Stun [Ailment]: Prevents skill CD reduction, movement, and skill use during the affected unit's turn. Also blocks activation of Charms or statuses that require casting. Base Resilience Break: 50
Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.

name: Summoner's Frenzy
description: Increases the ATK of summons.

name: Summoning Pact
description: Summoning consumes 2% of the caster's max HP to increase the summon's HP. Restores all HP consumed by this Charm if the caster survives until victory.
keywords: Consumption: Consumes the character's HP to a minimum of 1. Charms still activates even if less or no HP is deducted.

name: Sunset Sword
description: Deals Physical DMG 5 times to all enemies in a 3×2 grid area in front of the caster.

name: Swirling Blade
description: Attacks 1 enemy within 1 grid of the caster, dealing Water DMG once and converting 20% of the DMG dealt into a shield (up to 50% of the caster's max HP) for the caster for 2 turns.
keywords: Shield: Absorbs DMG, depleted before HP when taking DMG. When multiple shields are present: 1. Shields with a turn limit are depleted first, followed by shields without a turn limit; 2. Shields of the same type are depleted in order they applied.

name: Tactical Adaptation
description: When there are 3 or fewer enemies within 2 grids, increases the caster's DMG dealt. When there are more than 3 enemies within 2 grids, reduces the caster's DMG taken.

name: Tempest Edge
description: Each time the caster's Technique deals Crit DMG to an enemy, causes additional Wind DMG once.

name: Tempest Sphere
description: Deals Wind DMG 5 times to 1 enemy within 3 to 5 grids of the caster.

name: Thalasson Summon
description: Summons 1 Thalasson next to the caster that immediately acts. The summon inherits a percentage of the caster's stats. (The Technique can only trigger once per battle.)
keywords: Summon: Summon's level equals the skill level. Summons cannot receive any stat boosts.

name: Thunder Judgment
description: When an enemy within 5 grids of the caster casts a Technique, there's a 30% chance to trigger Thunder Strike, dealing Light DMG once. The chance increases to 90% if the target is inflicted with Electro or Wet.
keywords: Electro: When the target with Electro takes Light DMG from a Technique, removes the Electro to deal additional Light DMG once and chain it to 1 random enemy within 2 grids of the target.
Wet: Increases the chance of being Frozen by 30%.

name: Thunder of Judgment
description: Deals Light DMG 3 times to 1 enemy within 5 grids of the caster. (Prioritizes large targets)

name: Thunderbolt Mark
description: Each time the caster's Technique deals Light DMG to an enemy, there is a 65% base chance to inflict Electro.
keywords: Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.
Electro: When the target with Electro takes Light DMG from a Technique, removes the Electro to deal additional Light DMG once and chain it to 1 random enemy within 2 grids of the target.

name: Tough Soul
description: Increases the caster's HP.

name: Treantling Summon
description: Summons a Treantling behind the caster that immediately acts. The summon inherits a percentage of the caster's stats, but cannot be the primary target of attacks or healing. It remains for up to 5 turns. (Zero Initial CD)
keywords: Summon: Summon's level equals the skill level. Summons cannot receive any stat boosts.
Zero Initial CD: This skill can be cast on the caster's first turn and enters cooldown after casting.

name: Twin Gale
description: Deals Wind DMG twice to 1 enemy within 3 to 5 grids of the caster.

name: Unstable Aura
description: When the caster's Technique deals DMG to an enemy, there's a 25% chance to trigger Aura, dealing additional Wind DMG once, with a 60% base chance to knock them back by 1 grid.
keywords: Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.

Knockback: Knocks back the enemy target a certain distance. If collision occurs with other units or obstacles, the colliding enemy target take Physical DMG once equal to 10% of their max HP, at a max of 60% of the caster's ATK.

name: Valor Surge
description: Grants a DMG Boost to all allied characters within 5 grids of the caster for 2 turns and dispels 1 random status ailment or debuff. (Casts once before battle starts.)
keywords: Ailment: Severe status effects include: Frozen, Stun, Immobilize, Frenzy, and Action Delay. After a target is inflicted with an Ailment, the chance of ailment infliction next turn is halved and keeps dropping with each consecutive infliction.
Debuff: Negative effects include: stat reduction (e.g., ATK Reduction), DMG over time (e.g., Erosion), increased DMG taken (e.g., Shattering Sigil), Blind, Taunt, etc.

At the Start of Battle: When a character has multiple pre-battle skills to cast, they are activated in order: Charms before Techniques, from top to bottom based on their slot order. If multiple units have pre-battle skills, they act in order of highest to lowest SPD at the start of the pre-battle phase. The formal battle turn begins after all units from both sides have cast these skills.
Character: Main character and companions only. Summons and materialized Fantomons are not included.

name: Vital Rhythm
description: At the start of the caster's turn, gains 1 stack of Rhythm if the caster's HP is above 30%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.
keywords: Heal: When casting healing Techniques, only heals targets with less than 100% HP. Healing power is based on the caster's max HP.
Rhythm: Upon taking lethal DMG, the caster survives with 1 HP, consumes 1 stack of Rhythm, and heals the caster once.

name: Void Blessing
description: Selects a grid within 4 grids of the caster. Increases max HP of all allied characters within 2 grids of the target grid by a percentage of the caster's Max HP for 3 turns. This effect is unique. If the target's HP is below 30%, additionally performs a 5% healing. (Casts once before battle starts.)
keywords: Heal: When casting healing Techniques, only heals targets with less than 100% HP. Healing power is based on the caster's max HP.

At the Start of Battle: When a character has multiple pre-battle skills to cast, they are activated in order: Charms before Techniques, from top to bottom based on their slot order. If multiple units have pre-battle skills, they act in order of highest to lowest SPD at the start of the pre-battle phase. The formal battle turn begins after all units from both sides have cast these skills.
Max HP Boost: The bearer maintains the current HP percentage when effects that boost max HP are applied or removed.
Unique Stack: When a target is affected by this effect multiple times, only the best effect is retained.
Character: Main character and companions only. Summons and materialized Fantomons are not included.

name: Void Bubble
description: When the caster's HP drops below 50% for the first time in a battle, grants a shield to the caster based on max HP for 2 turns and Dodge for 2 turns (cannot be dispelled).
keywords: Dodge: When attacked, the bearer has a 50% chance to be immune to the incoming DMG.

Shield: Absorbs DMG, depleted before HP when taking DMG. When multiple shields are present: 1. Shields with a turn limit are depleted first, followed by shields without a turn limit; 2. Shields of the same type are depleted in order they applied.

name: Void Chant
description: Creates a magic rune that lasts 2 turns. When an enemy within 5 grids casts a Technique, the rune deals Dark DMG once to them. If the target carries Erosion, triggers the Erosion effect once. (Zero Initial CD)
keywords: Zero Initial CD: This skill can be cast on the caster's first turn and enters cooldown after casting.
Erosion: At the start of each turn, triggers Erosion once, dealing Dark DMG once. Erosion lasts for 3 turns. If the same character inflicts Erosion again with the same skill, the duration stacks.

name: Warrior's Essence
description: Increases the caster's ATK.

name: Water Assault
description: Deals Water DMG once to all enemies in a 3×4 grid area in front of the caster. DMG decreases by 25% for each subsequent hit on the same target. (Large targets may take multiple hits.)

name: Water Shot
description: Deals Water DMG once to 1 enemy within 4 grids of the caster.

name: Water to Ice
description: When the caster's Technique deals Water DMG to an enemy, there's a 50% chance to trigger Condensation, dealing additional Water DMG once, with a 30% base chance to inflict Frozen for 1 turn.
keywords: Frozen [Ailment]: Prevents movement and skill use, and disables activation of Charms or status effects that require casting. Cannot be frozen again while frozen. Base Resilience Break: 50
Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.

name: Waterling Summon
description: Summons a Waterling behind the caster that immediately acts. The summon inherits a percentage of the caster's stats, but cannot be the primary target of attacks or healing. It remains for up to 5 turns. (Zero Initial CD)
keywords: Summon: Summon's level equals the skill level. Summons cannot receive any stat boosts.
Zero Initial CD: This skill can be cast on the caster's first turn and enters cooldown after casting.

name: Weakening Hex
description: Selects a grid within 3 grids of the caster. Deals Dark DMG once to all enemies within 2 grids of the target grid, with a 50% base chance to inflict Weakened 1 for 2 turns.
keywords: Weakened 1: Reduces ATK by 15%. When multiple levels of the same status exist, only the highest level takes effect.
Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.

name: Whirlwind Slash
description: Deals Physical DMG 4 times to all enemies within a 1-grid square area of the caster.

name: Wind Blade Slash
description: Deals Wind DMG once to all enemies in a 1×4 grid area in front of the caster, with a 50% base chance to knock them back by 1 grid.
keywords: Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.

Knockback: Knocks back the enemy target a certain distance. If collision occurs with other units or obstacles, the colliding enemy target take Physical DMG once equal to 10% of their max HP, at a max of 60% of the caster's ATK.

name: Wind Blade Spiral
description: Selects a grid within 3 grids of the caster. Deals Wind DMG 3 times to all enemies within a 1-grid square area of the target grid, with a 40% base chance to inflict Laceration for 1 turn.
keywords: Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.
Laceration (Wind Blade Spiral): Takes Wind DMG once when moving (including skill movement, knockback, or pull effects). Laceration status lasts 1 turn and can stack.

name: Wind's Delight
description: Selects a grid within 6 grids of the caster. Launches 7 waves of wind blades at the target grid and random enemies within 1 grid to the target grid's left and right. Each wave deals Wind DMG once to all enemies within 1 grid of the enemy target. DMG decreases by 35% for each subsequent hit on the same target.

name: Wind's Shadow
description: Has a 30% chance to deal additional Wind DMG once and a 50% base chance to delay the target's action by 20% after dealing Wind DMG 3 times to an enemy with Techniques.
keywords: Base Chance: Represents the base chance of inflicting ailments on the target. The final chance is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit and the target's Effect RES.
Action Delay: Delays the target's action. A target can be delayed by up to 80% per turn.

name: Wind's Whisper
description: Increases the caster's Wind DMG.

name: Windless Lord
description: Increase DMG dealt by the caster's Wind Orbs. Each time a Wind Orb is generated, there's a 70% chance to generate another, up to 4 times per turn.
keywords: Wind Orb: A wind orb generated by the Charm - Sharp Feathers.
